name: Iterative content refinement with AI multi-pass
description: Takes draft content, uses Claude AI in multiple refinement passes to iteratively improve clarity, engagement, SEO, and tone, then posts the polished final version to Slack with before/after comparison. Adapted from n8n's GPT-4 multi-agent content refinement workflow.

source.originalName: Iterative content refinement with GPT-4 multi-agent feedback system

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting refined content

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the refined content

draftContent.description: The draft content to refine (article, blog post, email, etc.)

contentType.description: Type of content: blog post, article, email, social media, landing page

targetAudience.description: Target audience description for tone and style calibration

steps.name: Build first refinement pass prompt (clarity and structure)
Save pass 1 prompt to temp file
Run Claude AI pass 1 (clarity and structure)
Build second refinement pass prompt (engagement and tone)
Save pass 2 prompt to temp file
Run Claude AI pass 2 (engagement and tone)
Build third refinement pass prompt (SEO and polish)
Save pass 3 prompt to temp file
Run Claude AI pass 3 (SEO and polish)
Build Slack Block Kit message with refinement results
